evidence.quote: FUS mutations dominate TBK1 mutations in FUS/TBK1 double‑mutant ALS/FTD pedigrees
We screened 28 ALS patients with a known FUS mutation by whole-exome sequencing... We report on new and summarize previously published FUS and TBK1 double-mutant ALS/FTD patients
little is known how two pathogenic ALS/FTD mutations in the same patient interact to shape the final phenotype
without a manifest difference regarding age at onset and disease duration when compared to FUS single-mutant individuals
